title: Commands surface in lib: config normalization, preamble injection, status print+warn
action: Per D1: readConfig normalizes an optional commands object ({setup,start,test,verify}, each an optional non-empty string; anything else ignored) alongside hooks/lanes/capabilities. Per D3: buildSessionPreamble adds a short 'Standard commands' section when any command is set (max 4 lines) plus the baseline-gate reminder line when verify is set; bee_status includes commands in JSON and text output and appends a non-blocking staleness-style warning when the commands object is absent or empty ('no standard commands recorded — capture setup/start/test/verify in .bee/config.json'). Never block on absence. Extend test_lib.mjs with assertions for: absent commands (no section, warning present), partial commands, full commands (section present, verify reminder present).

truths: A config.json without commands behaves exactly as today except one added warning line in bee_status
When commands.verify is set, the session preamble names it and instructs the baseline check before claiming cells

artifacts.substantive: commands section built from readConfig, no duplicated config parsing

key_links: bee_status.mjs and inject.mjs both read commands via readConfig from state.mjs — single parse path
prohibitions: No change to existing preamble lines or status JSON fields (additive only)
No blocking behavior when commands are absent

trace.outcome: Commands surface added: readConfig normalization (COMMAND_KEYS, non-empty strings only), preamble Standard-commands section + baseline-gate line when verify set, bee_status commands field + none-recorded warning + text line. 37/37 tests.
trace.verification_evidence:
PASS  findRepoRoot walks up from a nested dir
PASS  readState returns defaults when state.json missing
PASS  addCell rejects an invalid lane
PASS  addCell rejects standard lane without must_haves.truths
PASS  addCell accepts a valid small cell and a standard cell with truths
PASS  claimCell refuses while gate execution is false
PASS  readyCells excludes cells with uncapped deps
PASS  claimCell refuses a cell with uncapped deps even after gate approval
PASS  claimCell claims an open, dep-free cell
PASS  capCell refuses without a passing verify result
PASS  capCell refuses when verify was recorded as failed
PASS  capCell refuses behavior_change without verification_evidence
PASS  capCell caps with passing verify + evidence, and unlocks dependents
PASS  capCell on a high-risk cell requires files_changed and outcome
PASS  capCell refuses a small cell whose verify has no output and no evidence (decision 0004)
PASS  capCell refuses a small cell with proof but empty files_changed (decision 0004)
PASS  tiny lane still caps on a passing verify alone (lanes scale strictness)
PASS  isKnownPhase accepts the enum + terminal alias and rejects drift
PASS  blockCell records the reason
PASS  reserve succeeds, then conflicts for another agent on the same path
PASS  same agent does not conflict with itself; directory prefix overlaps
PASS  release frees the path for other agents
PASS  sweepExpired releases TTL-expired reservations
PASS  checkWrite blocks source writes while idle (intake gate); config can disable it
PASS  checkWrite blocks source writes in a gated phase without execution approval
PASS  checkWrite blocks unreserved conflicting writes during swarming
PASS  checkRead denies secrets with a privacy marker, and generated dirs
PASS  extractBashTargets flags sed -i and redirection targets
PASS  logDecision rejects secrets and instruction-like content
PASS  supersede removes the old decision from the active set
PASS  datamark neutralizes fences and role tags
PASS  buildPromptReminder returns text + stable hash; dedup honors the hash
PASS  buildSessionPreamble mentions phase and gates
PASS  readConfig returns empty commands when config.json absent
PASS  buildSessionPreamble omits commands section when none recorded
PASS  readConfig keeps only known non-empty string commands
PASS  buildSessionPreamble shows commands and baseline gate when verify recorded

37 passed, 0 failed
